name: Phaser 3
description: Phaser 3 game canvas with an EventEmitter-based bridge. The Phaser scene emits 'end' with a result object to trigger navigation.
notes: Emit the game end event from inside your Phaser scene: this.game.events.emit('end', { score: 100 })
Add your Phaser scenes to PhaserCanvas.tsx in the scene array.
